assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md: Role="Rust backend service", Serena Instance="serena_backend", Path="/home/user/trustify-backend")
assertion_results.evidence: In claude-md-result.md line 7, the trustify-backend row reads: "| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |". Role is "Rust backend service", Serena Instance is "serena_backend", and Path is "/home/user/trustify-backend" — all matching the expected values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: In claude-md-result.md line 8, there is a new row: "| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |". The trustify-ui entry exists with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: In claude-md-result.md lines 12-16, Jira Configuration contains: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. All fields are preserved unchanged.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two sections: "## Preserved (unchanged)" listing the trustify-backend row and all Jira Configuration fields and Code Intelligence content, and "## Added (new)" listing the new trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitation entry. Both preserved and added entries are explicitly identified.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md has two subsections: "### serena_backend (already configured)" with Status: "Already present in Repository Registry" and Action: "No changes needed; preserved existing entry", and "### serena_ui (newly discovered)" with Status: "Not present in the existing Repository Registry" and Action: "Added to Repository Registry and Code Intelligence sections".

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: In claude-md-result.md lines 20-34: The naming convention text ("Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`"), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call), and the serena_backend limitation ("rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use") are all preserved. The only addition is line 34: "- `serena_ui`: No limitations known". The changes-log.md also confirms under "Preserved (unchanged)" that "Introductory text and example preserved verbatim" and the serena_backend limitation was preserved.
